---
title: Draft code and doc
---

# Let's get location

```r
#| load-pkg
library(pkgfilecache)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(devtools)
devtools::load_all()

# optional
library(tibble)
```

```r
#| load-pkg
devtools::load_all()
document()
test()
build_vignettes()
```


```r
#| id: proto-function
list_optional_files()

op <- get_raw_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_objective <- get_ref_objective_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_protocol <- get_ref_protocol_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
op_objective <- get_objective_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
sampling_point <- get_sampling_point_aspe() |> as_tibble()
op_description <- get_description_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_isolation <- get_ref_isolation_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
raw_ref_species <- get_species_aspe() |> as_tibble()

detail_sampling <- get_elementary_sampling_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_detail_sampling <- get_ref_elementary_sampling_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_prospection <- get_ref_prospection_method_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_passage <- get_ref_passage_aspe() |> as_tibble()

point_group <- get_point_group_aspe() |> as_tibble()
ref_point_group <- get_ref_point_group_aspe() |> as_tibble()

species <- cleaning_species_ref_aspe() |> as_tibble()

ref_batch_type <- get_ref_type_batch_aspe() |> as_tibble()
raw_fish_batch <- get_fish_batch_aspe() |> as_tibble()
raw_individual_measurement <- get_individual_measurement_aspe() |> as_tibble()
```


```r
op <- clean_operation_aspe() %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  filter(
    protocol %in% c("complete", "partial_by_point", "partial_over_bank")
  )

ele_sampling <- cleaning_elementary_sampling() |> as_tibble()
unique(ele_sampling$prelevement_type)
point_group <- cleaning_point_group()
```

```r
fish_batch <- clean_fish_batch(fish_batch = raw_fish_batch)
ind_measure <- clean_individual_measurement_aspe(
  ind_measure = raw_individual_measurement
)
```

```r
species_occurence <- fish_batch %>%
  distinct(operation_id, species_code) |>
  group_by(species_code) |>
  summarise(occurence = n())

```


## Get species name synonym

```r
species |>
  filter(species_code == "LPX")

species %>% filter(str_detect(latin_name, "Mugilidae"))
species[species$species_code == "MUC", ]$common_name_fr
species[species$species_code == "MUP", ]$latin_name
species_occurence |> filter(species_code %in% c("LOF", "LOL", "LOQ"))
species_occurence |> filter(str_detect(species_code, "MU[A-Z]"))

```

```r
# TODO:
# - clean only fish species, remove genra solved species, look at how much it removed? I.e.the ones who do not have an accepted name but that have one word name, finish by spp. or sp. or non latin name ("Hybride brème-gardon")
# - get maximum length for missing species?
fish_batch_ok <- fish_batch |>
  filter(!species_code %in% species_code_to_remove()) |>
  mutate(species_code = str_replace_all(
    species_code,
    species_code_to_replace()
  )
  )

species_code_present <- unique(
  c(fish_batch_ok$species_code)
)
species_present <- species |>
  filter(species_code %in% species_code_present)
species_syn_aspe <- unique(species_present$latin_name) |>
    rfishbase::synonyms() %>% select(
    provided_name = synonym,
    valid_name = Species,
    Comment = Status
  ) %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  left_join(
    select(species, species_code, latin_name),
    by = join_by(provided_name == latin_name)
  )
species_syn_aspe %>%
  print(n = Inf)

```

```r
species |>
  filter(
    latin_name %in%
      species_syn_aspe[is.na(species_syn_aspe$valid_name), ]$provided_name
  )
species_syn_aspe |>
  filter(is.na(valid_name)) |>
  print(n = Inf)
```

## Check maximum length

```r
check_size_ind_measure <- ind_measure %>%
  select(measure_id, species_code, size) %>%
  left_join(
    select(species, species_code, latin_name, maximal_length_mm),
    by = join_by(species_code)
  )
```

```r
#| id: sp-na-max-size
check_size_ind_measure |>
  filter(size > (maximal_length_mm + maximal_length_mm * 10/100))
```

```r
#| id: sp-na-max-size
check_size_ind_measure |>
  filter(is.na(maximal_length_mm)) |>
  distinct(species_code, latin_name)
n_na_max_length <- check_size_ind_measure |>
  filter(is.na(maximal_length_mm)) |>
  nrow()
n_na_max_length / nrow(check_size_ind_measure)

```

## Filter samplings based on sensible default


```r
#| id: point-group
filtered_sampling <- filter_operation_batch_measure(
  operation = op,
  op_protocol_to_keep = c("complete", "partial_by_point",  "partial_over_bank"),
  op_objective_to_exclude = vec_op_objective_to_exclude(),
  oldest_sampling_date = "1995-01-01",
  omit_na_site = TRUE,
  point_group = point_group,
  min_prop_point_group_on_bank = .999,
  ele_sampling = ele_sampling,
  max_passage_number = 1,
  fish_batch = fish_batch,
  ind_measure = ind_measure
)

sanatize_species_code <- function(
  data = get_fish_batch_aspe(),
  species_var = species_code,
  species_to_remove = species_code_to_remove(),
  species_to_replace = species_code_to_replace()
){
  data <- data |>
    filter(!{{species_var}} %in% species_to_remove) |>
    mutate({{species_var}} := str_replace_all(
      {{species_var}},
      species_to_replace
    )
    )
  data
}
sanatize_species_code(
  data = filtered_sampling$fish_batch
)

check_aspe_fish_species <- function(
  species = c("ABL", "TRF"),
  species_ref = cleaning_species_ref_aspe()
){
  species <- unique(species)
  # Check all provided code are in ref:
  species_mask_ref <- species %in% species_ref$species_code
  if (!all(species_mask_ref)) {
    warning("Missing species in reference: ",
            paste(species[!species_mask_ref], collapse = ", "),
            ". Please check provided species names.")
  }

  # Check species to fishbase
  species_ref <-  species_ref |>
    dplyr::filter(species_code %in% species)
  latin_names <- dplyr::pull(species_ref, latin_name)

  latin_names_valid <- latin_names |>
    rfishbase::validate_names()

  if (any(is.na(latin_names_valid))) {
    warning(
      "Missing species in fishbase: ",
      paste(latin_names[is.na(latin_names_valid)], collapse = ", "),
      ", corresponding to ",
      paste(species_ref$species_code[is.na(latin_names_valid)], collapse = ", "),
      ". Please check reference table or the provided species.")
  }

}
check_aspe_fish_species(c("ABL", "ANG", "TRT", "LPX"))


fish_batch_ok <- filtered_sampling$fish_batch |>
  filter(!species_code %in% species_code_to_remove()) |>
  mutate(species_code = str_replace_all(
    species_code,
    species_code_to_replace()
  )
  )

fish_batch_ok |> unique(.data$species_code) |> rfishbase::validate_names()

ind_measure_ok <- filtered_sampling$ind_measure |>
  filter(!species_code %in% species_code_to_remove()) |>
  mutate(species_code = str_replace_all(
    species_code,
    species_code_to_replace()
  )
  )

check_size_ind_measure <- ind_measure_ok %>%
  select(measure_id, batch_id, species_code, size) %>%
  left_join(
    select(species, species_code, latin_name, maximal_length_mm),
    by = join_by(species_code)
  )

check_size_fish_batch <- fish_batch_ok %>%
  select(batch_id, batch_type, species_code, max_length) %>%
  left_join(
    select(species, species_code, latin_name, maximal_length_mm),
    by = join_by(species_code)
  )

## TODO: add warning in future check
check_size_ind_measure |>
  filter(is.na(maximal_length_mm)) |>
  distinct(species_code, latin_name)
check_size_fish_batch |>
  filter(is.na(maximal_length_mm)) |>
  distinct(species_code, latin_name)

check_size_ind_measure %>%
  filter(size > maximal_length_mm) %>%
  arrange(desc(size - maximal_length_mm))
check_size_fish_batch %>%
  filter(max_length > maximal_length_mm) %>%
  arrange(desc(max_length - maximal_length_mm))



````

## Generate fish size from batch


```r
options(mc.cores = 10)
operation_id_sample <- sample(op$operation_id, 1000)
batch_test <- fish_batch %>%
  filter(operation_id %in% operation_id_sample) %>%
  select(-c(
    weight, estimated_weight, mep_id, tlo_id,
    prelevement_id, operation_id
  ))
measure_test <- ind_measure %>%
  filter(operation_id %in% operation_id_sample) %>%
  select(-c(site_id:prelevement_id, measure_id))
system.time({
test <- get_size_from_batch(
      batch = batch_test,
      id_var = batch_id,
      batch_type_var = batch_type,
      nb_var = number,
      min_var = min_length,
      max_var = max_length,
      species = species_code,
      measure = measure_test,
      measure_id_var = batch_id,
      size_var = size)
})
```

```r
#| eval: FALSE
# 50min to run
options(mc.cores = 10)
fish_ind_size <- get_size_from_batch(
  batch = filtered_sampling$fish_batch |>
    select(-c(weight, estimated_weight, mep_id, tlo_id,
      prelevement_id, operation_id
    )),
  id_var = batch_id,
  batch_type_var = batch_type,
  nb_var = number,
  min_var = min_length,
  max_var = max_length,
  species = species_code,
  measure = filtered_sampling$ind_measure %>%
    select(-c(site_id:prelevement_id, measure_id)),
  measure_id_var = batch_id,
  size_var = size)
save(fish_ind_size, file = "~/Téléchargements/fish_ind_size.rda")
````

```r
load("~/Téléchargements/fish_ind_size.rda")
fish_ind_size %>%
  unnest(size_mm)
```

## Other things

```r
#| id: species
sp <- cleaning_species_ref_aspe() |> as_tibble()
```

```{r elementary-sampling}

ele_sampling <- cleaning_elementary_sampling() |> as_tibble()
ele_sampling %>%
  filter(is.na(passage_number))
```


```r
op_description <- clean_description_operation_aspe() |> as_tibble()
```
